ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "unit_number" INTEGER /* Unit number of the property */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "baths" REAL /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "sqft" INTEGER /* Square footage of the property */,
  "list_price" TEXT /* List price of the property */,
  "sold_price" TEXT /* Sold price of the property */,
  "price_per_sqft" TEXT /* Price per square foot of the property */,
  "settled_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was sold */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property */,
  "property_status" TEXT /* Status of the property */,
  "listing_agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who listed the property */,
  "selling_agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who sold the property */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the property was listed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the property listing was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each real estate agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the agent */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the agent operates */,
  "brokerage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brokerage the agent belongs to */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the agent's account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the agent's account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agents_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agents_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property sold */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who made the sale */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was sold */,
  "sale_price" TEXT /* Price at which the property was sold */,
  "sale_type" TEXT /* Type of sale */,
  "sale_status" TEXT /* Status of the sale */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Date when the sale was closed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sale was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sale was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the region is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code for the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "list_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was listed */,
  "list_price" TEXT /* List price at the time of listing */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when a change occurred */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made to the property listing */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_history_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year for the trend data */,
  "average_price" TEXT /* Average price of properties sold */,
  "average_price_per_sqft" TEXT /* Average price per square foot */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trend data was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trend data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer purchased a property */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Type of customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer's account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer's account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_purchase_date FOREIGN KEY ("purchase_date") REFERENCES sales ("sale_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "financing" (
  "financing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financing option */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "loan_type" TEXT /* Type of loan */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate for the loan */,
  "loan_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the loan */,
  "loan_status" TEXT /* Status of the loan */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the financing option was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the financing option was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financing_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspection_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection report */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property inspected */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date when the inspection took place */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Name of the inspector */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Details of the inspection report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the inspection report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inspection report was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inspection report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspection_reports_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when maintenance was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the maintenance record was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the maintenance record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who left the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the customer review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was posted */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance from the property */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the amenity */,
  "amenity_category" TEXT /* Category of the amenity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the amenity was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the amenity was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amenities_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_images_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brokerages" (
  "brokerage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brokerage */,
  "brokerage_name" TEXT /* Name of the brokerage */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the brokerage */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the brokerage */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the brokerage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the brokerage was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the brokerage was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brokerage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agent_brokerages" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent */,
  "brokerage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brokerage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was established */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id", "brokerage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission")
)
